page_title: Stacking Vigne Evangelion New Theatrical Edition: THE BATTLE OF EVANGELION
text:
is a line of candy toys produced by Shokugan that was released in Mid August 2011. https://www.bandai.co.jp/candy/products/2011/695789.html The line was based on the Rebuild of Evangelion film series. There are 5 regular and 1 secret figure (Provisional Unit-05 versus Third Angel) in the line. All figures can be connected through the bases, making it a complete vignette.
